notes: Manually crafted ugly fixture. Rows 0-1 are free-text title rows exported from Altium Designer. Header is on row index 2. 'Mfg Part #' is a non-standard synonym for MPN; 'Count' is a non-standard synonym for Qty. Row 5 (U1) has a Digi-Key SKU (296-1386-1-ND) in the MPN field — a real-world data quality issue. Row 6 (LED1 LED2) has an empty MPN but a populated description and Digi-Key PN.
